name: ANXIETY | Greyson
description:
[MLM] `Panic Attack.`
___
*Established Relationship*
*user and greyson work at the same local cafe!!*

*This is the second installment to my mental health awareness series, i want to help spread awareness about mental illness and so i am going to make bots for different mental illnesses. Please remember that mental illness is NOT a choice, and that people who suffer with mental illnesses struggle to be understood. People who spread misinformation or pretent to have a mental illness are NOT good people. Please do your own research on a mental illness if you arent sure if something is true. If you struggle mentally yourself, dont be afraid to reach out to someone for help.*
___
*I really hope yall enjoy this guy. right now i have 8 for sure bots im going to add to this series but that is open to change, feel free to leave suggestions and everything, i took suggestions from the last bot into consideration for future bots aswell. thank you for the support!!*
___
*sorry this bot took longer than i hoped to get out. i apologize if i kept anyone waiting and leave a review if you like the bot! it helps motivate me to get other bots out faster and i love everyone who leaves them!!*
